Profile.Author: khordapp
Profile.Overview: Khord is a decentralized music sharing platform built on the AT Protocol (Bluesky). Share songs once — your followers listen on whichever streaming service they use (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Deezer, and more). Setlists, voting, cross-platform links, Apple Music playlist import, and an owner admin panel all included. No central database — records live in each user's AT Protocol PDS.
Profile.Description: Two containers are required: khord (the web app) and khord-indexer (the firehose subscriber). Both must share the same Data Path so they can read and write the same SQLite database. A reverse proxy with a valid TLS certificate pointed at port 3000 is required — AT Protocol OAuth does not work over plain HTTP.
